name: MOE MOE DAIUNDOUKAI
short_description: MOE MOE DAIUNDOUKAI is a survival game with minimalistic gameplay and roguelite elements. the rivals are here, and there's no place to run or hide. All you can do is survive as long as you can until death inevitably puts an end to your struggles.
detailed_description:
MOE MOE DAIUNDOUKAI is a survival game with minimalistic gameplay and roguelite elements.
the rivals are here, and there's no place to run or hide.
All you can do is survive as long as you can until death inevitably puts an end to your struggles.
Gather gold in each run to buy upgrades and help the next survivor.

Gather in-game gold. You can make upgrades to your skills at the shop.
Skills upgraded at the shop are permanent.

Skills gained from stages are temporary.
Find the optimal skill combination.

Supports mouse, keyboard
